platform.headline: Built on Ultranet. Proven at Scale.

ultranet.title: Ultranet
ultranet.desc: Distributed cloud-native networking layer connecting cloud, IoT, and edge.

motebus.title: MoteBus
motebus.desc: Patented peer-to-peer communication protocol — xMsg and xRPC.

sphere.title: SPhere
sphere.desc: Enterprise cloud in a box. Runs on PC or Raspberry Pi.

edge.title: Edge Intelligence
edge.desc: Deploy AI processing at the network edge, not just the cloud.

solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.headline: From IoT to AI — Without Starting Over

items.title: Industry 4.0 Integration
items.desc: Connect factory equipment, sensors, and legacy systems into a unified cloud analytics layer — no rip-and-replace required.

items.title: AI Agent Orchestration
items.desc: Deploy Flow Bot to automate complex enterprise workflows. Trigger, route, and respond — all without writing backend code.

items.title: Smart Space Deployment
items.desc: Combine Smart Screen broadcasting and IP IVR to build intelligent environments for retail, healthcare, and public spaces.
